parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE((SELECT (value)::text::boolean FROM public.settings WHERE key='ai_enabled_global'), true) AS ai_enabled_global,
  (SELECT value->>'start'    FROM public.settings WHERE key='after_hours_window') AS hours_start,
  (SELECT value->>'end'      FROM public.settings WHERE key='after_hours_window') AS hours_end,
  (SELECT value->>'timezone' FROM public.settings WHERE key='after_hours_window') AS tz;

SELECT
  COALESCE(c.human_locked, false) AS human_locked,
  COALESCE(c.ai_enabled,  true)  AS ai_enabled,
  (c.id IS NOT NULL)            AS conversation_exists
FROM (SELECT 1) z
LEFT JOIN public.conversations c ON c.chatwoot_conversation_id = $1::integer;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [JSON.stringify({ reason: 'conversation_locked', phone: $json.phone, msgId: $json.msgId, human_locked: $json.conversation_human_locked, ai_enabled: $json.conversation_ai_enabled, test_run_id: $json.test_run_id }), $json.chatwoot_conversation_id] }}

={{ [JSON.stringify({ phone: $json.phone, msgId: $json.msgId, message_type: $json.messageType, target_workflow: 'IGOR_03', current_flow: 'after_hours', is_after_hours: true, hour_evaluated: $json.hour_evaluated, test_run_id: $json.test_run_id }), $json.chatwoot_conversation_id] }}
